General.Name: Mobotix AG
General.Description: Mobotix AG manufactures and sells video security systems in Germany and internationally. The company provides video systems, including fixed dome, PTZ speed dome, hemispheric, turret and flat eye, multidirectional, bullet, and thermal cameras, as well as special bundles. It also offers MOBOTIX MOVE, an integrated video management software. In addition, the company provides MOBOTIX HUB, a video management platform; MOBOTIX CLOUD; MOBOTIX, a video management system; MxManagementCenter video management system for windows and macos; MOBOTIX LIVE App, a video remote station; MOBOTIX SYNC, an intelligent data center; and MOBOTIX MOVE network video recorder, a plug and play solution for local video surveillance system. Further, it offers GPS box, USB keyboard, media converter, MxIRLight, and MxSwitch. It provides its solutions to industry, production, energy, utilities, mining, government, retail, education and science, healthcare, hotel and food catering, logistics and freight, culture and tourism, and traffic and mobility through distributors, dealers, and sales partners. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Winnweiler, Germany. Mobotix AG operates as a subsidiary of Certina Software Investments Ag.
